steps.title: Use sinuosity to compare
steps.content: Sinuosity measures curviness as the ratio of stream length to valley length. The notes say the Muskwa River has high sinuosity and the Cheyyar River has low sinuosity.

steps.title: Choose the direct comparison
steps.content: B explains how to calculate curviness without comparing the rivers. C states a shared definition, not a difference. D reverses the notes by calling Cheyyar high-sinuosity and Muskwa low-sinuosity. The comparison that gives Muskwa the greater ratio fits. The answer is A.
